title: GINGER REVEAL — signed by Ginger from the magic forest
prompt: Tight close-up on @beach-shore tide line. @Sara already turning the @rescue-note over to read the back. The bottom corner of the paper has handwritten text reading 'GINGER' followed by a tiny pawprint stamp. Sara's eyes go HUGE — pure shock and recognition. @Eva already pressed in beside her, eyes equally huge. Sara (gasping, barely a breath): "...Ginger? GINGER?!" Eva (jaw dropped): "From the MAGIC FOREST?!" Sara (looking back at the note, then at the camera): "It's HER! She's the FOX from our adventure!" Eva (clutching her face with both hands): "She NEEDS US!" Both girls look at each other with determined faces.
